mapper.select: SELECT user_id, pet_id, record_date, SUM(amount) AS amount, MIN(record_time) AS record_time, MIN(created_at) AS created_at FROM water_records WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND pet_id = #{petId} AND record_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY user_id, pet_id, record_date ORDER BY record_date ASC
